176 E1000B_WNDR_INTRD_PRVCY_CD E1000B_WNDR_INTRD_PRVCY_CD E1000B Wandering Intrudes on Privacy of Others CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident's wandering significantly intrudes on the privacy or activity of others. -=Not assessed/no information
